title: InvenotrySlotSteal
body:
![Inventory slot steal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c399835014097763bbdcd34cdbd96299b79abae6.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Inventory Slot Steal
LifeSteal But with Inventory Slots[
About the Plugin
Inventory Slot Steal
Lifesteal but with Inventory Slots

Working
Every player gets 10 inventory slots at the beginning and gains 1 inventory slot for every kill, losing 1 inventory slot for every death.

36 (All) Slots = ??
A Booster Shard is dropped. You can add any commands to that shard and give player rewards.

0 Slots = Ban??
Customizability is the key. Trap players in a jail or ban them using commands.

Permissions
INVSS.ADMIN - Admin Commands

Commands
/revive - Revive GUI
/invsteal boxspawn : TP LOCATION (0 Slots)

Custom Model Data
Revive Gem: 2222
Booster Shard: 3333

This Plugin is in its Beta Stage, Suggestions are Very Appreciated

</details>


Tutorial By KasaiSora
